title: Sending email in automations when the email address is in a Mirrored column
excerpt:
I’ve researched but could not find the answer. 
I have a board where I want to send emails using automations. But, the email address in this board is on a Mirror column. Therefore I can not use it in the automation as th…

posts.author: danihaimson (Daniel Haimson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve researched but could not find the answer.

I have a board where I want to send emails using automations. But, the email address in this board is on a Mirror column. Therefore I can not use it in the automation as the destination email.
I’ve tried using Formula to pull the email address from the mirror column, but formula also doesn’t work in automations.

Any workaround?

Thanks!

posts.author: grigortopev (Grigor Topev)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same issue! There should be an easy fix, but Im new to Monday.com.

posts.author: chuckadamsiv (Chuck Adams)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a very similar issue; I cannot utilize mirrored columns with emails for automations. It’s very frustrating!

posts.author: IanCT (Ian Atkins)
posts.cookedHtml: Same issue - would love a solution here if there is one. Otherwise, this would be a helpful feature.

posts.author: Koos (Koos Kamerling)
posts.cookedHtml: Seems so basic, need this as well!

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
@danihaimson @Koos @IanCT @grigortopev @chuckadamsiv

Nir from Jetpackapps here. Wanted to let you know that our app VLOOKUP Auto-link does what you need- VLOOKUP can link email address column to multiple boards while keeping monday automations, permissions and reporting.

Check it out and let me know if you have any questions.

monday.com

monday.com: Apps Marketplace

monday.com apps marketplace, Expand the capabilities of your Work OS with monday apps

posts.author: adm (Adam Marshall)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a native solution to this?
I’m quite tired of Monday.com functionality falling short of what can reasonably be expected, so that they can support a developer community filling the gaps with pay-to-use apps. Presumably Monday love this as they get a cut of the sales?
Is there another Monday.com solution out there that does not prioritize profit in this way?

posts.author: Raincloud (Anthony Adamson)
posts.cookedHtml: This is exactly what is happening. The mirror columns are not a specialty feature, they are integrated in every board I have set up and really just a basic spreadsheet feature. Email automations are useless to me because I don’t need automations on the board storing my contacts, I need them on the boards that mirror the email address. When I signed up I reluctantly had to go with pro because I planned to use a lot of automations, but Monday.com has thwarted me so many time with this nonsense that I can’t build 75% of what I wanted. It’s not like they tell you about stuff like this up front. Now they know how hard it will be for us to switch.

posts.author: Lea1 (Lea)
posts.cookedHtml: soo anoying if someone found a workaround i would love to hear it

posts.author: KMcG (Kelly McGarity)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have the ability to create accounts and contacts that can be linked to each other.
Within the contact & account boards we can store email addresses.
We can link the accounts & contacts boards within the projects board.

But within monday.com, on the projects board, we cannot utilize the email addresses from another board (accounts & contacts) to send emails, (even though they are linked with a mirror column showing the email addresses), without entering the email addresses (again) in the board we want the emails to be sent from.

We’re offered the ability to house all of our information in one system, using multiple boards to handle different portions of the information; we’re offered the ability for automations to allow an efficient process. BUT… the automations can only be used with the information within ONE board! This makes no sense.

(Before anyone suggests… No, we do not want to pay a micro-transaction to allow for this feature - it’s too basic.)

Why isn’t mirrored columns more appropriately utilized?

Why isn’t anyone responding to this concern??

posts.author: arkitrave (Eric Shepherd)
posts.cookedHtml: This is another problem with mirrored columns that is probably related to the same underlying technology limitations Monday hasn’t fixed yet. Mirrored columns are also not searchable with search_everything - it’s like they don’t actually exist. Upvoting!

posts.author: EmpireTelecomDevTeam (ET)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use Zapier to grab the information on the mirror column and send automatic emails to our customers.
However it is very frustrating that this is not a standard feature on Monday.com
Zapier also helps us since Monday wont allow for HTML emails only basic text.

posts.author: isa_ROCKETHAMMER (Isabelle Charest)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same problem here. Any update from Monday.com about correcting that?

posts.author: Zak.harris (Zak Harris)
posts.cookedHtml: Having a similar issue. What is the point of having multiple boards if the software relies on using a single board to maximise automations. IMO, having the ability to utilise the connected board information or mirror field is essential and should be a feature Monday.com adds.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. The most popular workaround for using automations on mirrored columns - like your use-case of Sending email in automations when the email address is in a Mirrored column is the VLOOKUP app.

You can learn more here VLookup: The Best Alternative to Monday.com Mirror Columns

posts.author: gsl12thscouts (Iain stanley)
posts.cookedHtml: Same Issues, and as a Non for Profit organisation wanting to do this on multiple boards the $45 a month is out of the question, i have spent hours sorting the mirror out and in the end had a zoom with Monday.com support but failed to ask about the email automation aspect so now back to square one really as can not complete the automation we were looking for

posts.author: treasanders (Trea Sanders)
posts.cookedHtml: Would you please show me how you are doing this? I am at a standstill and desperately need help.

posts.author: kescott (Katie Escott)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! I’ve used an automation called ‘Text Builder’ under Column Magic, where when the item is created, it copies the email from the mirrored column to another column. Then, I use this new column for my automations. This has been working so far!

posts.author: EmpireTelecomDevTeam (ET)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Trea,

We use the “Specific Column Value Changed in Board” trigger in Zapier for Monday .com to create status values within Monday that are triggered based on the status of the project.

For example, we set up an automation in Monday so that when the project status changes from “Moving Along” to “Equipment Shipped,” it updates another (hidden) status called “Equipment Shipped Email” to “Send,” which triggers the Zap.

image1070×590 24.4 KB

Screenshot 2024-08-01 at 8.43.51 PM1114×600 19.8 KB

Within Zapier, this allows us to pull any data from a given column, including items being pulled from another board using the “Connected Boards” value. We then send emails using Outlook in Zapier.

Screenshot 2024-08-01 at 8.44.09 PM1228×500 6.45 KB

posts.author: chrisgeorgiou46 (Chris Georgiou)
posts.cookedHtml:
Daniel Haimson:

I have a board where I want to send emails using automations. But, the email address in this board is on a Mirror column. Therefore I can not use it in the automation as the destination email.

I am having the same difficulty. We have upgraded Monday.com to use automations, and now we can’t use the automations on mirrored columns? Please enable this feature, it seems like a very standard thing that many people want.

posts.author: mike.bleyenheuft (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml: Still no resolution to this?? C’mon Monday.com, this should be a basic feature.

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

Until there is a native solution in monday, you might find our Column to Column app useful.

It introduces recipes to copy values between columns, including:

  • Mirror column to other columns
  • Formula column to other columns
  • Any column to mirror column

image1506×823 73.3 KB

You can use it to copy a mirrored email address to the email address column, which can be used in automations.

image432×340 12.9 KB

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to us!

posts.author: Austin1 (Austin)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s absolutely ridiculous that we spend like $1,500 a year on this software and this feature is not available despite seeming so simple and necessary.

posts.author: Austin1 (Austin)
posts.cookedHtml: doesn’t exist anymore.

posts.author: Austin1 (Austin)
posts.cookedHtml: How much do I have to pay some third party to make such a basic feature that should be native work?

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey users ,

Instead of using a mirror column, you could use a regular column with our app Mirror Item Multiple Boards.

What You Can Do with Mirror Item -

Add the SAME ITEM ON MULTIPLE BOARDS with live sync and full context

Sync UPDATES + REPLIES in real time for items and subitems

Set up automations like “When status changes to something, mirror item to target board and group”

Create a Master Board with items/subitems from multiple boards

Add a subitem from one board as a main item on another board

Keep your boards clean and connected with Regular Columns — no Mirror Columns or Connect Boards needed

191920×960 210 KB

Once you use it, you could use the regular email column to send emails.

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co if you need assistance with setup.
